task_completion.description: Title and metadata are formatted correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'INSTALLATION QUALIFICATION PROTOCOL' to be centered, bold, and noticeably larger than the body text. The metadata (Protocol No, Equipment, Effective Date) should be centered directly below the title.

task_completion.description: Heading styles are applied to main and sub-sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for distinct heading styles (e.g., larger, bolded text) applied to main sections like '1.0 PURPOSE' through '10.0 APPROVAL' and a secondary heading style for sub-sections '7.1 IQ-001' through '7.6 IQ-006'.

task_completion.description: Equipment Identification table is created in Section 4.0
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 2-column table in Section 4.0 with the column headers 'Parameter' and 'Specification'.

task_completion.description: Six test case tables are created in Section 7.0
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for multiple tables in Section 7.0 (for IQ-001 through IQ-006). Each table must contain rows for Test ID, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Method, Expected Result, Actual Result, and Pass/Fail.

task_completion.description: Acceptance Criteria Summary table is created in Section 8.0
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table in Section 8.0 with the column headers 'Test ID', 'Test Title', 'Acceptance Criteria', 'Result', and 'Status'.

task_completion.description: Signature Block is created in Section 10.0
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a signature section in Section 10.0 containing 'Prepared By', 'Reviewed By', and 'Approved By', each with fields or spaces for Name, Title, Signature, and Date.

task_completion.description: Table headers are bold and body text is formatted
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check that the headers in all created tables are bolded. The body text should appear to be a standard serif font (like Times New Roman) and consistently sized.

task_completion.description: Document is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the filename 'iq_protocol_formatted.docx' in the word processor's title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a file explorer window in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used a word processing application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be interacting with a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document, not just a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Agent used UI controls for formatting
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using the application's ribbon, menus, or dialogs to insert tables, apply heading styles, center text, and change fonts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI formatting
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like python scripts or pandoc being used to automatically generate the formatted .docx file from the raw text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The raw document is located at /home/ga/Documents/iq_protocol_raw.docx. The final formatted document must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/iq_protocol_formatted.docx. The equipment specified is 'Agilent 1260 Infinity II HPLC'. The document must contain exactly 8 tables: 1 Equipment Identification table, 6 verification test case tables, and 1 Acceptance Criteria Summary table.
